text: Financial performance in Q2 2025 demonstrates strong profitability metrics, with operating margin of 19.77% and net margin of 20.74% K003, K004. Net income reached $642M in Q2 2025, representing 316.88% year-over-year growth from Q2 2024's $555M K002. However, the company issued margin warnings for the third and fourth quarters of 2025, which contributed to a 7% share price decline despite beating earnings estimates C022. R&D intensity remains elevated at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025, indicating continued investment in product development K005.
